decision: Keep participant-level random split and basic MFCC/CNN/metadata pipeline as reference.
evidence: MFCC/logistic and RF reached around 0.75-0.80 AUROC; fusion around 0.88.
outcome: Useful baseline but not enough to address professor concern about low single-modality numbers or SOTA comparisons.

decision: Add strict temporal holdout, time-stratified split, month label/covariate shift, and month ablation.
evidence: Temporal AUROC dropped from 0.873 to 0.566 in earlier stress test; month removal improved metadata temporal AUROC by 0.247.
outcome: Strong reliability story: collection month acts as shortcut.

decision: Replace simple LR-only baseline with extended acoustic features and multiple learners with SMOTE/Optuna/fusion.
evidence: Strong internal AUROC reached about 0.891 but not >0.90 consistently.
outcome: Improved internal numbers but did not create SOTA-level evidence.

decision: Fine-tune WavLM-base-plus branches on segmented cough/breath/speech.
evidence: Cough and breath test AUROC stayed around 0.79 on practical run.
outcome: Stopped as unproductive for timeline; evidence that heavier model alone was not enough.

decision: Try PSO-style feature subset search and gated prediction stacking.
evidence: PSO validation objectives around 0.73-0.77; gated stack test around 0.891, not materially above strong baseline.
outcome: Not final headline; retained only as negative/rescue evidence.

decision: Extract standardized OpenSMILE ComParE2016 and IS10, merge with strong features, select top-k by LightGBM.
evidence: Final internal selected result reached AUROC 0.897; paper-style CV cough 0.819 and speech 0.806.
outcome: Best final internal pipeline; still below SOTA papers but cleaner and more reproducible.

decision: Run existing participant split, time-stratified split, strict temporal split, and COUGHVID external transfer on the final feature strategy.
outcome: Final defensible research result: strong internal performance does not survive external transfer.
